title: Adjudicator (disambiguation)
content:
'''Adjudicator''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Adjudicator]]''''', an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Adjudicator (hilt)|Adjudicator]]''', a style of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Lightsaber hilt/Legends|hilt]].
*'''[[Adjudicator (slugthrower)|Adjudicator]]''', a [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka]] manufactured [[Slugthrower pistol/Legends|slugthrower pistol]].
*'''''[[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|Adjudicator]]''''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] later known as the ''Liberator''.
*'''''[[The Adjudicator]]''''', a publication for [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].
{{Disambig}}
